description: You are a Database Administrator performing a disaster recovery operation. A junior developer accidentally deleted all records from the year 2009 in the production database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). Restore the missing 2009 Invoices and InvoiceItems from the backup database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_backup.db) into the production database while ensuring the existing 2025 data remains intact. Save the SQL recovery script used for this operation to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/recovery_script.sql.
